series_metadata.series_description: Records relating to manufactured home installation permits. This record series includes, but is not limited to, applications, grants or denials of a permit or extension; installation permits; temporary occupancy permits; notices of expiring permit; alternative designs; installation plans; foundation designs; homeowner/installation agreements; and inspection reports.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: The record shall be destroyed three years after the expiration/revocation of the installation permit (including any extension periods), three years after the denial of an installation permit, or three years after the date a home passed a final inspection, whichever is later. ; Paper: If an electronic version of the record exists, the paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of the record does not exist, then the paper record shall be destroyed three years after the expiration/revocation of the installation permit (including any extension periods), three years after the denial of an installation permit, or three years after the date a home passed a final inspection, whichever is later., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
